title: Marketplace Manager - Porter Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Porter Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Porter Advisory Limited family as a Marketplace Manager in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Porter Advisory Limited:
Porter Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
